description: Fetch trusted URL content and publish structured facts for downstream intents.
routing_examples: Fetch this URL and summarize key date facts: https://www.hebcal.com/hebcal?cfg=json&year=2026&v=1&maj=on&i=off
Look up this official page and extract the holiday dates
Read this docs URL and pull the required fields
router_hints: Use this intent for explicit URL fetch/extract requests.
Prefer this intent as a prerequisite step when downstream intents need trusted external facts from a specific URL.
Do not use for open-ended web browsing; fetch only explicit or policy-approved URLs.
